headline: Ahead of hurricane season, Duke Energy Foundation awards $130,000 to 10 organizations advancing storm preparedness and community resiliency
summary: With the 2026 hurricane season starting on June 1, the Duke Energy Foundation is awarding $130,000 to 10 organizations that are preparing communities across Florida for storms, while also strengthening their resiliency and capacity for safe, coordinated recovery.

headline: Are Utilities Stocks Lagging  Duke Energy (DUK) This Year?
summary: Here is how Duke Energy (DUK) and Companhia Paranaense de Energia - Copel Unsponsored ADR (ELPC) have performed compared to their sector so far this year.
